identity.name: KrishiSetuAI
identity.mission: Empowering farmers with AI-driven market access and voice-first technology.

typography.instructions: Use Manrope for all body text and numbers (prices). Use Outfit for English headings. Use Noto Sans Devanagari for all Hindi text. Ensure high contrast.

grids.listings: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6

mobile_adaptations: Floating Action Button (FAB) for Voice Assistant

voice_assistant.position: fixed bottom-6 right-6 md:bottom-8 md:right-8 z-50
voice_assistant.visual: h-16 w-16 rounded-full bg-primary shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center animate-pulse-slow hover:scale-105 transition-transform

cards.style: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300 overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border-2 border-primary/20 hover:border-primary hover:bg-green-50 rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-primary hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors

inputs.style: h-12 rounded-xl border-slate-200 bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all text-lg

badges.verified: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border border-blue-100
badges.organic: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-green-50 text-green-700 border border-green-100
badges.quality_grade: inline-flex items-center justify-center h-8 w-8 rounded-full bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 font-bold text-sm border border-amber-200

icons.style: Stroke width 2px for clarity. Use rounded line joins.

hero_main.alt: Happy Indian farmer in rice field with smartphone
hero_main.desc: Use in Hero section with a soft gradient overlay at the bottom.

wheat_crop.desc: Use for Wheat category or Quality Grading feature.

potato_crop.desc: Use for Potato category or listing example.

market_scene.desc: Use for Marketplace or Buyer Connect section.

motion.philosophy: Functional and calming. No erratic movements.

accessibility.voice_support: All critical actions must be voice-accessible.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring (ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2) for keyboard navigation.

technical_instructions.charts: Recharts (Simple LineChart for price trends, PieChart for crop distribution)
technical_instructions.maps: Use a static placeholder or simple SVG map for District selection if no library available.
technical_instructions.forms: React Hook Form + Zod for validation.
universal_guidelines: DO NOT center align everything; use left align for text readability.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons and inputs.
Ensure the 'Mic' button is always visible on mobile.
